nodes.name: GitHub Webhook
nodes.notes:
Displayed URL comes from n8n env WEBHOOK_URL (ConfigMap aaf-n8n/n8n-config), not this note.

PUBLIC (VS Code Dev Tunnel) — set in cluster:
  WEBHOOK_URL=https://kk01hvzx-30678.inc1.devtunnels.ms/

Production (workflow Active):
  https://kk01hvzx-30678.inc1.devtunnels.ms/webhook/github-fastapi-ci

Test (Listen for test event):
  https://kk01hvzx-30678.inc1.devtunnels.ms/webhook-test/github-fastapi-ci

If UI still shows http://127.0.0.1:30678/... update ConfigMap and restart deploy/n8n.

GitHub webhook Payload URL = Production URL above.
Keep the tunnel (30678) running.

parameters.command: =/bin/bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; if [ -f "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env" ]; then set -a; . "$HOME/.config/fastapi-ci.env"; set +a; fi; export GIT_SHA="{{ $json.sha }}" BRANCH="{{ $json.branch }}" REPO_DIR="${REPO_DIR:-/home/yashree/development/fast-api}" API_DIR="${API_DIR:-$REPO_DIR/apps/api}" WEB_DIR="${WEB_DIR:-$REPO_DIR/apps/web}" API_IMAGE_REPO="${API_IMAGE_REPO:-smitambalia/n8n}" WEB_IMAGE_REPO="${WEB_IMAGE_REPO:-smitambalia/fast-web}" KUBECONFIG_PATH="${KUBECONFIG_PATH:-$HOME/.kube/k3s.yaml}" DEPLOY_API=1 DEPLOY_WEB=1; "$REPO_DIR/scripts/ci-deploy.sh" 2>&1'

nodes.name: SSH: Build Push Deploy
nodes.notes: MUST select credential: Host 10.42.0.1 Port 22 User yashree (SSH Password account you tested).

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, skipped: true, reason: 'Not main/master', branch: $json.branch, sha: $json.sha } }}
